content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Checklist item 'Jurisdiction-specific rules checked (anti-indemnity, retainage, prompt payment, prevailing wage)' is not satisfied or addressed in the draft.", "fix": "Add an explicit statement that jurisdiction-specific rules (anti-indemnity, retainage, prompt payment, prevailing wage) have been reviewed or are to be confirmed by counsel."}, {"problem": "Checklist item 'Flow-down obligations verified for subcontractor agreements' is not explicitly satisfied.", "fix": "Insert a short clause confirming that any required flow-downs to subcontractor agreements have been or will be verified by counsel."}, {"problem": "Checklist item 'NNN maintenance matrix populated; structural repairs not shifted to tenant without instruction' is not fully satisfied; the draft only states no modification without confirming matrix population.", "fix": "Add language confirming that the NNN/maintenance matrix has been reviewed/populated and that structural repair obligations are unchanged and not shifted to Tenant."}, {"problem": "Checklist item 'ADS fixed defaults applied and Pakistan labour law compliance table checked (Pipeline G only)' is not addressed.", "fix": "Include a brief note that ADS fixed defaults and the Pakistan labour law compliance table are not applicable or will be confirmed if Pipeline G applies."}]}
